# testdata — deterministic PDF fixtures

Generated by `generate_pdfs.py` (run it with the backend venv:
`backend/venv/bin/python testdata/generate_pdfs.py`). The PDFs are
**byte-reproducible** (reportlab `invariant=1`, PyMuPDF `no_new_id`) and are
**committed** together with the script so pytest, Playwright and
`create_fake_data` (the A1 sample project) all consume identical bytes.

**Policy (docs/plan/06 §6):** never edit a generated PDF by hand; change the
generator and regenerate in a PR that also updates the truth table below.

## Files

| File | Purpose | Flows/tests |
|---|---|---|
| `contrato_v1.pdf` | Native-text baseline: 8 numbered sections | C1, engine sectioning, A1 sample |
| `contrato_v2.pdf` | The documented re-delivery (truth table below) | C2, E1, **D5 queen test** |
| `escaneado_v1.pdf` | Raster of v1, no text layer | scanned-scenario detection, OCR path |
| `sin_encabezados.pdf` | Headless prose | section-per-page fallback (DP-09) |
| `protegido.pdf` | Password-protected (`versiona-secreta`) | upload rejection (needs_pass) |
| `corrupto.pdf` | Invalid magic bytes | upload rejection (magic/parse) |

## contrato_v1.pdf sections

1. OBJETO DEL CONTRATO · 2. DEFINICIONES · 3. OBLIGACIONES DEL CONTRATISTA ·
4. OBLIGACIONES DEL CONTRATANTE · 5. VALOR Y FORMA DE PAGO ·
6. PLAZO DE EJECUCION · 7. CONFIDENCIALIDAD · 8. RESOLUCION DE CONTROVERSIAS

## Truth table: v1 → v2 (the exact contract for engine, D5 and E2E assertions)

| v1 section | Change in v2 | Expected engine result | D5 effect on a covering seal |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1. Objeto | none | unchanged | preserved w/ validity record |
| 2. Definiciones | none | unchanged | preserved w/ validity record |
| 3. Obligaciones del contratista | paragraph 2: penalty 2% → **5%** (and 10% → 20% cap) | **modified** | **invalidated / re-review** |
| 4. Obligaciones del contratante | none | unchanged | preserved |
| 5. Valor y forma de pago | amount COP $100.000.000 → **$120.000.000** | **modified** | invalidated |
| 6. Plazo de ejecución | **removed** | **removed** | invalidated |
| 7. Confidencialidad | same body, renumbered → **6.** | unchanged (match by title/content, not number) | preserved |
| 8. Resolución de controversias | same body, renumbered → **7.** | unchanged | preserved |
| — | **added** "8. PROTECCION DE DATOS PERSONALES" | **added** | n/a (no prior seal) |

Reference D5 scenario (`06` §5.4): reviewer A seals sections {1, 2} → both
preserved; reviewer B seals {3, 7} → invalidated because 3 changed (7 stays
intact and is recorded as such in the partial evidence); only B is notified.
